"finding_id": "openscap_065",
  "is_optimal": false,
  "approve": false,
  "feedback": null,
  "concerns": [
    "Incomplete remediation script results in partially modified configuration files",
    "Added maxpoll directives may create duplicate or malformed entries",
    "Service restart failed, potentially leaving NTP/Chrony non-functional",
    "Changes do not guarantee correct application of maxpoll across all server/pool/peer lines"
  ],
  "suggested_improvements": [
    "Use a proper configuration management tool (e.g., Ansible, Puppet) to edit files idempotently",
    "Validate configuration syntax with chronyc or ntpd before restarting the service",
    "Test the modified configuration and ensure the service starts successfully",
    "Prefer editing include files in /etc/chrony.d/ rather than the main chrony.conf directly"
  ],
  "security_score": 2,
  "best_practices_followed": false
}
